reason: Successfully executed GitHub username verification through the agent using GitHub tools with proper account access flow.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing sidebar with agents.
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260408-001359-s818" in the sidebar — Agent detail view opened.
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status confirmed in header showing "idle" badge.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message successfully submitted and agent status changed to "working".
Waited for request card and granted GitHub account access — Account request card appeared showing GitHub account already connected, clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant access.
Allowed GitHub API request (GET /user) — Permission dialog appeared, clicked "Allow Once" to permit the authenticated user API call.
Waited for response completion — Agent processed for 41 seconds and returned final response.
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response clearly states: "Your GitHub username is **yiw190**."
Took final screenshot documenting the successful completion — Screenshot saved showing full conversation flow and the GitHub username response.
